notes:
SHIP v1.14.326 - HANDOFF feature-hero art onto the redesign Work->Handoff screen (PHANTOM_FEATURE_ART_HANDOFF.md, web-Claude; the 2nd of the 2 panels, completing the pair with .325 PLATFORMS). ⚠OWNER OVERRIDE OF RECORD: I held this panel because its baked decorative text (SOURCE_SYNC 88%, HANDOFF PROTOCOL 77b, STEP 4 OF 9, serials) is fake status landing on the real Shift Handoff screen - an honesty-lock concern I raised three times. Owner ruled 'no use it' (2026-07-21) = ship as-is; the baked text is a DECLARED decorative override on this status surface (same class of owner exception as the EXIT-red-in-rd exception) - do NOT 'correct' it back in a future pass. DELIVERED: (1) new precached FILE icons/phantom-feat-handoff-720.webp (720x720 VP8X webp, 114766 bytes, decoded+validated from the handoff base64; files-not-inline per owner .325 ruling). (2) Static
mounted as the FIRST child of #wk-handoff (the Work->Handoff work-sub, ~L12900), above the SHIFT HANDOFF caption + Open Handoff button. NO JS touched. (3) NO CSS change - reuses the .pfeat / .pfeat__art rules shipped in .325. DEVIATIONS (same as .325, reported): src=file URL not data-URI (owner ruling); loading='lazy' (sub is offscreen until the Handoff tab is opened; art is SW-precached so it loads instantly from cache); alt='' decorative. GATING: #wk-handoff lives inside #pg-work (class 'page'); .page is display:none;visibility:hidden by default (L1056) and only reveals via .page.active, which is added by the redesign showMode under body.rd. Legacy never activates the redesign pages, so #wk-handoff (and this art) CANNOT render under ?legacy=1 => ?legacy byte-identical, no extra gate. Gates: CSS brace-balance UNCHANGED (no CSS added), all 4 inline
